home.not_logged_in_message: The simple and powerful RPG dice rolling tool.
home.not_logged_in_text_intro: This tool lets you create or join rooms with fully functional chat and dice rolling.
home.not_logged_in_text_login: You must be connected to use it. Click the button below to connect with your Discord account.

api.description: Generate a personal API key to integrate Rolz with custom scripts or bots.
api.enforcement: Requests coming from domains other than rolz.asmotym.fr must include this key in the X-API-Key header.
api.emptyState: Generate a key to start using the API.
api.copyError: Unable to copy the API key. Please copy it manually.
api.generateError: Unable to generate the API key.
api.revokeError: Unable to revoke the API key.
api.confirmRevoke: Revoking this key will break existing integrations. Continue?
api.loadError: Unable to load your API key.

doc.title: Dice roll history endpoint
doc.description: Bring the dice activity of any room into your own tools by calling the read-only dice rolls endpoint below.
doc.endpointHelp: Returns only dice messages for the selected room. Combine it with your API key whenever the request does not originate from rolz.asmotym.fr.
doc.authDescription: Send the API key you generated above in the X-API-Key header and request JSON responses with Accept: application/json.
doc.pathRoomIdDescription: Identifier of the room you want to inspect. You can copy it from the room URL or from previous API responses.
doc.queryLimitDescription: Optional integer that caps how many dice rolls are returned. Defaults to 50 and is limited to 200. Without other filters, results are sorted from newest to oldest.
doc.querySinceDescription: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z). When set, only dice rolls created strictly after this moment are returned and they are sorted from oldest to newest.
doc.responseDescription: Responses always follow a success/data structure. The data object echoes the roomId and exposes diceRolls, an array of dice chat messages (id, userId, username, nickname, diceNotation, diceTotal, diceRolls[], createdAt, ...).
doc.roomsDescription: Use this endpoint to fetch every room you created or joined. The payload mirrors what you see in Settings → Rooms.
doc.roomsEndpointHelp: Returns both active and archived rooms linked to the user identified by your API key.
doc.roomsResponseDescription: Responses return success with data.rooms. Each room entry matches the app (id, name, inviteCode, isProtected, memberCount, lastActivity, archivedAt, isArchived, isCreator, createdBy, createdAt).
doc.membersDescription: Use this route to retrieve the full roster of a room you belong to.
doc.membersEndpointHelp: Requires your API key and only works if you are a member of the requested room.
doc.membersResponseDescription: Responses return success plus data.roomId and data.members. Each member contains userId, username, nickname, avatar, joinedAt, lastSeen, and isOnline.

rooms.archivedDescription: Archived rooms stay available to you but hidden from other members.
rooms.emptyActive: You have not joined any rooms yet.
rooms.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete the room '{name}'? This will make it unavailable for everyone.

sidebar.title: Rooms
sidebar.empty: No rooms yet. Create one to get rolling.
sidebar.publicRoomHint: Leave empty for a public room

chat.messageInput: Send a message or roll a dice (e.g. d100, 2d100, +2d100, ...)
chat.dicePrefixHelp: You can prepend a dice roll with a "+" or "-"; "+" counts the roll as an advantage.
chat.advantageExample: - "+2d100" counts the roll as an advantage and keeps the best roll
chat.disadvantageExample: - "-2d100" counts the roll as a disadvantage and keeps the worst roll
chat.emptyDescription: Pick a room from the list on the left or create a new one to start chatting and rolling dice.

members.title: Room members
members.empty: No members yet. Invite a friend to get started.

fields.notationHint: Use + for advantage and - for disadvantage, such as +2d100 or -2d100.

category.title: Dice categories
category.label: Category
category.signIn: Sign in to manage categories for this room.
category.description: Group similar dice together by creating categories you can reuse.
category.name: Category name

panel.title: Dice Roll
panel.signIn: Sign in to manage and roll your custom dice for this room.
panel.empty: You haven't saved any dice for this room yet. Add one from Settings -> Dices.

settings.signInDice: Sign in to manage your dice for this room.
settings.createHelp: Provide a dice notation (e.g., 1d20+3, +2d100, or -2d100) and optionally a description to remember what it is for.
settings.signInView: Room dice are tied to your account access. Sign in to view them.
settings.empty: You haven't saved any dice for this room yet. Use the form above to add one.

errors.needRoomForDice: You need to be in a room to add dice.
errors.invalidNotation: Enter a valid dice notation (e.g., 1d20+3, +2d100, or -2d100).
errors.needRoomForCategory: You need to be in a room to add categories.

roomDetails.title: Room details
roomDetails.creatorHelp: You can rename this room for everyone.
roomDetails.nonCreatorHelp: Only the creator can rename this room.

nickname.title: My nickname
nickname.help: Set a display nickname for this room only. Leave blank to use your Discord username.

panel.description: These awards automatically go to the players who match their tracked dice results the most.
panel.disabled: Roll Awards are disabled for this room.
panel.empty: No awards defined yet. Use the Manage button to create one.
panel.noObtained: No awards have been obtained yet. Try showing all awards to see every entry.
panel.currentLeader: Current leader with {count} hit. | Current leader with {count} hits.
panel.tiedLeaders: Tied leaders with {count} hit. | Tied leaders with {count} hits.

settings.description: Track iconic dice results and automatically highlight the players who roll them most often.
settings.creatorOnly: Only the room creator can enable and edit Roll Awards.
settings.enable: Enable Roll Awards for this room
settings.disabled: Roll Awards are currently disabled. Toggle the switch above to start configuring them.

clipboard.unavailable: Clipboard is not available in this browser.

form.help: Add the dice results that should count toward this award, then give it a descriptive name. Optionally filter it to a specific dice notation.
form.editing: Editing existing award. Changes will update "{name}".
form.notationHint: Separate die sizes with commas (e.g., d20, d100). Leave blank to include all dice.
form.ownerHelp: Players who total the most tracked results automatically own this award.
form.empty: No awards created yet. Use the form above to add your first Roll Award.

import.description: Review the awards detected from your clipboard before importing them into this room.
import.noneFound: No valid awards found to import.

import.creatorOnly: Only the room creator can import awards.

criticals.title: Critical rules
criticals.description: Highlight dice messages when totals are above or below important thresholds. If multiple rules match, the last one in the list wins.
criticals.creatorOnly: Only the room creator can manage critical rules.
criticals.ruleDescription: Highlights the full dice message when the result is {operator} {threshold}.
criticals.empty: No critical rules yet. Add one above to color dice messages in this room.

errors.signIn: Sign in to manage critical rules.
errors.maxRules: You can only save up to {count} critical rules.
errors.wholeNumber: The number must be a whole number.
errors.duplicate: A rule with this comparison and number already exists.
